# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - name: vm-with-public-ip
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    location: <your-location>
    properties:
      vmName: <your-vm-name>
      image:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: <your-windows-server-sku>
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        name: myosdisk
        caching: None
        createOption: Attach
        diskSizeGB: 128
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: vm-nic
            properties:
              ipConfigurations:
                - name: vm-ip
                  properties:
                    publicIPAddress:
                      name: vm-public-ip
                      properties:
                        publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
                    subnet:
                      id: <your-subnet-id>

outputs:
  - name: vm-public-ip
    value: $[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('vm-public-ip'))]
